sentences.arabic: وَجَدَ إِبْرَاهِيمُ كِتَابًا قَدِيمًا فِي مَكْتَبَةِ المَدْرَسَةِ.
sentences.translation: Ibrahim je pronašao staru knjigu u školskoj biblioteci.
sentences.translationEn: Ibrahim found an old book in the school library.

sentences.arabic: كَانَ الكِتَابُ عَنْ الحَيَوَانَاتِ فِي الغَابَةِ.
sentences.translation: Knjiga je bila o životinjama u šumi.
sentences.translationEn: The book was about animals in the forest.

sentences.translation: Čitao ga je s velikim zanimanjem i uživao u njemu.
sentences.translationEn: He read it with great interest and enjoyed it.

sentences.arabic: أَخْبَرَ أَصْدِقَاءَهُ عَنِ الكِتَابِ فِي الاِسْتِرَاحَةِ.
sentences.translation: Rekao je prijateljima o knjizi u odmoru.
sentences.translationEn: He told his friends about the book during break.
